---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<!-- ── HERO ── -->
<section style="min-height:100vh; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; padding: 0 6vw; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.18em; color:#0ea5e9; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
    <span style="color:#00e676;">●</span> &nbsp;from0tohero.dev — v1.0
  </p>

  <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(2.8rem,7vw,6rem); font-weight:800; line-height:1.05; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;">
    Du terrain.<br>
    <span style="color:#0ea5e9;">Pas des slides.</span>
  </h1>

  <p style="font-size:1.05rem; color:#475569; max-width:500px; line-height:1.8; margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    Articles, réalisations et profils de praticiens tech —
    Data, DevOps, Cloud, IA, Cybersécurité, Dev.
  </p>

  <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:5rem;">
    <a href="praticiens/index.html"
       style="background:#f97316; color:#fff; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
              font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.08em;
              text-transform:uppercase; padding:0.75rem 1.6rem;
              border-radius:2px; text-decoration:none;">
      Voir les praticiens
    </a>
    <a href="soumettre/index.html"
       style="background:transparent; color:#0f172a; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
              font-size:0.78rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase;
              padding:0.75rem 1.6rem; border-radius:2px;
              border:1px solid #bae6fd; text-decoration:none;">
      Soumettre mon profil
    </a>
  </div>

</section>

<!-- ── STATS ── -->
<section style="padding:3rem 6vw; border-top:1px solid #bae6fd; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">
  <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:2rem;">
    <div>
      <p style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:2rem; font-weight:800; color:#0ea5e9; margin:0;">1</p>
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; margin:0.2rem 0 0 0;">Praticien</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <p style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:2rem; font-weight:800; color:#0ea5e9; margin:0;">1</p>
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; margin:0.2rem 0 0 0;">Pays</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <p style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:2rem; font-weight:800; color:#0ea5e9; margin:0;">1</p>
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; margin:0.2rem 0 0 0;">Réalisation</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <p style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:2rem; font-weight:800; color:#0ea5e9; margin:0;">0</p>
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#94a3b8; text-transform:uppercase; margin:0.2rem 0 0 0;">Articles</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ── SECTION ARTICLES ── -->
<section style="padding:5rem 6vw; border-top:1px solid #bae6fd; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#0ea5e9; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// articles</p>
    <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3vw,2.2rem); font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Ce que les praticiens écrivent</h2>
    <p style="color:#94a3b8; font-size:0.9rem; margin:0;">Articles publiés sur Medium, LinkedIn, Dev.to — agrégés ici.</p>
  </div>

  <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.82rem; color:#94a3b8; margin-bottom:2rem;">
    Les premiers articles arrivent bientôt. Tu en as un à partager ?
  </p>

  <a href="soumettre/index.html" style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.78rem; color:#0ea5e9; text-decoration:none; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase;">Soumettre un article →</a>

</section>

<!-- ── SECTION BOOTCAMP ── -->
<section style="padding:5rem 6vw; border-top:1px solid #bae6fd; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#0ea5e9; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// bootcamps</p>
    <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3vw,2.2rem); font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Apprendre par la pratique</h2>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr)); gap:1.25rem;">

    <a href="https://diakite-data.github.io/data-engineering-bootcamp/" style="text-decoration:none;" target="_blank">
      <div style="background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; border-radius:6px; padding:2rem; transition:border-color 0.2s;">
        <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#00e676; margin-bottom:1rem;">● live</p>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Data Engineering</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#475569; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Python · Airflow · dbt · Spark · GCP · Kafka</p>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:2rem; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#94a3b8;">
          <span>35 modules</span>
          <span>1 100+ apprenants</span>
          <span>40+ pays</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>

    <a href="https://da.from0tohero.dev" style="text-decoration:none;" target="_blank">
      <div style="background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; border-radius:6px; padding:2rem;">
        <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#94a3b8; margin-bottom:1rem;">○ coming soon</p>
        <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Data Analyst</h3>
        <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#475569; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">SQL · Python · Power BI · Tableau · Stats</p>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:2rem; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#94a3b8;">
          <span>En construction</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </a>

  </div>

</section>

<!-- ── COMMENT ÇA MARCHE ── -->
<section style="padding:5rem 6vw; border-top:1px solid #bae6fd; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#0ea5e9; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// comment ça marche</p>
    <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3vw,2.2rem); font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0;">Figurer sur from0tohero.dev en 3 étapes.</h2>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr)); gap:1.25rem;">

    <!-- Étape 1 -->
    <div style="background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; border-radius:6px; padding:1.75rem; position:relative;">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#0ea5e9; margin-bottom:1rem;">01</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Crée ton profil</h3>
      <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#475569; line-height:1.6; margin:0 0 1rem 0;">Nom, rôle, stack, bio et liens. C'est l'étape obligatoire — elle ancre tout le reste.</p>
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:#94a3b8;">~2 minutes</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Étape 2 -->
    <div style="background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; border-radius:6px; padding:1.75rem;">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#0ea5e9; margin-bottom:1rem;">02</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Soumets une réalisation ou un article</h3>
      <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#475569; line-height:1.6; margin:0 0 1rem 0;">Pipeline, dashboard, API, bootcamp, article Medium ou LinkedIn — ce que tu as vraiment construit.</p>
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:#94a3b8;">Optionnel · illimité</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Étape 3 -->
    <div style="background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; border-radius:6px; padding:1.75rem;">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#00e676; margin-bottom:1rem;">03</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Validation & publication</h3>
      <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#475569; line-height:1.6; margin:0 0 1rem 0;">Ton profil apparaît sur le site sous 48h.</p>
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.68rem; color:#94a3b8;">Délai max · 48h</p>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div style="margin-top:2rem;">
    <a href="soumettre/index.html"
       style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.08em;
              text-transform:uppercase; color:#0ea5e9; text-decoration:none;">
      Commencer →
    </a>
  </div>

</section>

<!-- ── CTA FINAL ── -->
<section style="padding:6rem 6vw; border-top:1px solid #bae6fd; text-align:center; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">
  <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#0ea5e9; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:1rem;">// tu es praticien ?</p>
  <h2 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,3rem); font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; margin:0 0 1rem 0;">Montre ce que tu construis.</h2>
  <p style="color:#94a3b8; font-size:0.95rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">Profil · Articles · Réalisations — tout en 5 minutes.</p>
  <a href="soumettre/index.html"
     style="background:#f97316; color:#fff; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
            font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.08em;
            text-transform:uppercase; padding:0.85rem 2rem;
            border-radius:2px; text-decoration:none;">
    Soumettre →
  </a>
</section>
```
